etymology.description: semantic: ťÖČ (wine) + phonetic: ū¶ĚĘ (y«íu, content of a vessel) = minced pickled meat -> fermented or pickled meats
etymology.interpretation: ťÜĘ(h«éi, 'minced pickled meat') combines the semantic component ťÖČ(y«íu, 'wine') referring to fermentation or pickling, with the phonetic component ū¶ĚĘ(y«íu, 'content of a vessel') to suggest the process of making pickled meat.
